DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFFS BRIAN MARZAN AND MING HUI MA'S MOTION TO QUASH OR MODIFY DEPOSITION SUBPOENA IS GRANTED. THE DEPOSITION SUBPOENA AT ISSUE SERVED SEPTEMBER 25, 2013 IS OVERBROAD, AND SHALL BE MODIFIED AS STATED IN THE LETTER TO JAMIESON K. FONG DATED OCTOBER 1, 2013, UNLESS THE PARTIES REACH A MUTUAL AGREEMENT TO OTHERWISE MODIFY THE SUBPOENA PRIOR TO HEARING ON THE MATTER. PLAINTIFFS' REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE PRO TEM: REBECCA WOODSON; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED. (D302)

Off Calendar Jul-17-2014 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-22-2013 Set For Trial On Jun-02-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Or Modify Subpoena, Or For Issuance Of A Protective Order
Off Calendar Nov-26-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Arlo Garcia Uriarte, Esq. of Liberation Law Group, PC, Tel. 415.695.1000, for plaintiffs and moving party;
Jamieson K. Fong, Esq. of Stratman Patterson & Hunter, Tel. 415.509.2540, for defendants and opposing party.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFS BRIAN MARZAN and MING HUI MA's Motion to Quash or Modify Deposition Subpoena is GRANTED. The deposition subpoena at issue served September 25, 2013 is overbroad, and shall be MODIFIED as stated in the letter to Jamieson K. Fong dated October 1, 2013, unless the parties reach a mutual agreement to otherwise modify the subpoena prior to hearing on the matter. Plaintiffs' request for sanctions is DENIED. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Rebecca Woodson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
